description: Lock Planetary-Scale Sensor Webs to technical Earth-observation and distributed-sensor infrastructure rather than climate-treaty governance.

checks.reason: Satellite remote sensing captures the orbital observation layer used by global environmental sensor webs.
Advanced AI captures automated interpretation, prediction, scheduling, and retasking across adaptive sensor webs.
IoT and ubiquitous connectivity capture the linked software, internet, and distributed-instrument substrate.
Climate treaties are governance consumers or application context, not a direct technical prerequisite for distributed sensor webs.
